description: You are acting as the Facilities Manager for the 'Office Renovation' project. The team has decided to simplify how they track utility work. Consolidate the issue categories by removing the 'Plumbing' and 'Electrical' categories and reassigning all their existing issues to the 'MEP' (Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing) category. When finished, only the 'MEP' category should remain for utility work, and all previous tickets must be preserved under this category.
